summary: Excellent front‑of‑house soundboard capture of a stellar Shakedown Street performance highlighted by Jerry’s fiery call‑and‑response with Brent.
review: The reviewer rates this recording five stars, calling it one of their all‑time favorite Shakedown Street shows. They specifically praise the late‑song “Red Hot” call‑and‑response exchange between Jerry Garcia and keyboardist Brent Mydland, indicating both a superb performance and a clear, well‑mixed front‑of‑house recording.

ai_rating.rationale: A single enthusiastic five‑star review highlights an outstanding performance and no recording flaws; limited data lowers confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Front‑of‑house (FOB) feed praised as clear and well‑balanced; no issues reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set pacing; reviewer simply notes the show is a favorite.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Noted for an exciting call‑and‑response with Brent late in Shakedown Street.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent Mydland highlighted for his interplay with Jerry during the Red Hot section.
